methods.name: cdk_certbot_dns_route53.BashExecFunction.__init__
documentation:
---
param architecture: 'Custom lambda Image Architecture. Default: - lambda.Architecture.X86_64'
param dockerfile: The path of your custom dockerfile.
param environment: Lambda environment variables.
param id: '-'
param role: 'Custom lambda execution role. Default: - auto generated role.'
param scope: '-'
param script: The path of the shell script to be executed.
param timeout: 'The function execution time (in seconds) after which Lambda terminates
  the function. Because the execution time affects cost, set this value based on the
  function''s expected execution time. Default: - Duration.seconds(60)'
---

methods.name: cdk_certbot_dns_route53.BashExecFunctionProps.timeout
documentation:
The function execution time (in seconds) after which Lambda terminates the function.

Because the execution time affects cost, set this value based on the function's expected execution time.

:default: - Duration.seconds(60)

methods.name: cdk_certbot_dns_route53.CertbotDnsRoute53Job.__init__
documentation:
---
param architecture: 'Custom lambda Image Architecture. Default: - lambda.Architecture.X86_64'
param certbot_options: certbot cmd options.
param destination_bucket: The S3 bucket to store certificate.
param enabled_lambda_function_url: 'Enabled Lambda Function URL. Default: - false'
param function_url_options: 'Options to add a url to a Lambda function. Default: -
  authType: lambda.FunctionUrlAuthType.NONE'
param id: '-'
param schedule: 'run the Job with defined schedule. Default: - no schedule'
param scope: '-'
param zone: The HostZone on route53 to dns-01 challenge.
---

---
param architecture: 'Custom lambda Image Architecture. Default: - lambda.Architecture.X86_64'

param destination_bucket: The S3 bucket to store certificate.

param function_url_options: 'Options to add a url to a Lambda function. Default: -
  authType: lambda.FunctionUrlAuthType.NONE'
param schedule: 'run the Job with defined schedule. Default: - no schedule'
param zone: The HostZone on route53 to dns-01 challenge.
---

methods.name: cdk_certbot_dns_route53.CertbotDnsRoute53JobPython.__init__
documentation:
---
param architecture: 'Custom lambda Image Architecture. Default: - lambda.Architecture.X86_64'
param certbot_options: certbot cmd options.
param destination_bucket: The S3 bucket to store certificate.
param enabled_lambda_function_url: 'Enabled Lambda Function URL. Default: - false'
param function_url_options: 'Options to add a url to a Lambda function. Default: -
  authType: lambda.FunctionUrlAuthType.NONE'
param id: '-'
param schedule: 'run the Job with defined schedule. Default: - no schedule'
param scope: '-'
param zone: The HostZone on route53 to dns-01 challenge.
---

methods.name: cdk_certbot_dns_route53.CertbotOptions.__init__
documentation:
---
param custom_prefix_directory: 'Custom prefix directory on s3 bucket object path.
  Default: - `s3://YOUR_BUCKET_NAME/2021-01-01/your.domain.name/`'
param domain_name: the domain must host on route53 like example.com.
param email: Email address for important account notifications.
---

methods.name: cdk_certbot_dns_route53.CertbotOptions.domain_name
documentation:
the domain must host on route53 like example.com.

Example:

```
- `*.example.com` or `a.example.com` .
```

methods.name: cdk_certbot_dns_route53.CertbotOptions.email
documentation: Email address for important account notifications.

methods.name: cdk_certbot_dns_route53.CertbotOptions.custom_prefix_directory
documentation:
Custom prefix directory on s3 bucket object path.

```
default

s3://YOUR_BUCKET_NAME/2021-01-01/your.domain.name/
```

Example:

```
- customPrefixDirectory: 'abc' -> `s3://YOUR_BUCKET_NAME/abc/your.domain.name/`
```
